calibration_texts: Compression research needs clean baselines before bigger claims.
We focus on per-head value output compression in a small decoder only model.
Random orthoprojectors and PCA are the first baselines before RPEDR search.
evaluation_texts: Compression research needs clean baselines before bigger claims.
We focus on per-head value output compression in a small decoder only model.
Random orthoprojectors and PCA are the first baselines before RPEDR search.
A calibration split and a held out split should stay separate.
